title: Kaikoura 0.3m Rural Aerial Photos (2016-2017)
description: Orthophotography within the Canterbury region captured in the 2016-2017 flying season, published as a record of the Kaikoura Earthquake event.

providers.name: Toitū Te Whenua Land Information New Zealand

capture_area.title: Capture area
capture_area.description: Boundary of the total capture area for this collection. Excludes nodata areas in the source data. Geometries are simplified.
